subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Nearness unto Thee is my hope, and to stand before Thy countenance is my heart's desire, and to hearken unto the flowing of Thy Pen is my cherished wish, and to attain Thy presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی قربک رجائی و القیام امام وجهک بغیتی و اصغاء صریر قلمک املی و الحضور
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @martyrs and martyrdom, @Greatest Name
